'''Heedon''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who hated his own first name enough to never use it.

==Biography==
Heedon owned and operated the ''[[Starcrossed]]'', a luxury liner during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], but as few could afford to book passage due to [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] oppression, Heedon joined the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]. He was responsible for [[Evacuation of Horob|rescuing]] [[Sayer Mon Neela]] from the ''[[Imperial Hazard]]'' .<ref name="TCoIH" />
